skill.name: learn-on
skill.description: Enable continuous learning mode so a compatible router can capture session insights automatically.
skill.summary: Turns on automatic insight capture for long assistant sessions.
skill.author: 0xrdan

security_audit.summary: AI review found that the static external command alerts are false positives from markdown backticks and fenced examples in SKILL.md. The weak cryptography alert is also a false positive on frontmatter description text, with no cryptographic code or algorithm usage found.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: Markdown Backticks
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged backtick-formatted text and fenced examples as Ruby or shell execution. The referenced lines contain markdown inline formatting, JSON example text, output text, and slash command names, not executable code.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: The file is markdown documentation, and every flagged backtick appears inside prose or fenced display content. No shell command, Ruby code, subprocess call, or command execution instruction is present.

low_findings.title: Dismissed Static Finding: Weak Cryptography
low_findings.description: Static analysis flagged line 3 as weak cryptography, but the line is the skill frontmatter description. No hash function, cipher, key handling, or cryptographic API appears in the reviewed file.
low_findings.confidence_reasoning: Line 3 contains only descriptive metadata for continuous learning mode. There is no evidence of DES, MD5, SHA1, or any other cryptographic implementation.

content.value_statement: Long AI sessions can lose useful decisions, patterns, and observations. This skill enables a router state flag so compatible systems can extract insights automatically.
actual_capabilities: Reads the existing learning state from knowledge/state.json.
Sets learning_mode to true for compatible router workflows.
Records when continuous learning mode was enabled.
Resets the query counter used for extraction thresholds.
Confirms that automatic extraction will run after configured activity thresholds.
limitations: Requires a compatible router that reads knowledge/state.json.
Does not perform insight extraction by itself.
Writes only the learning mode state requested by the skill.
Learning behavior depends on the surrounding knowledge system.

use_cases.title: Capture Long Debugging Sessions
use_cases.description: Enable automatic learning during extended debugging work so recurring findings can be saved for later review.

use_cases.title: Maintain Project Knowledge
use_cases.description: Turn on session learning before architecture or planning discussions to preserve decisions and project conventions.

use_cases.title: Reduce Manual Note Taking
use_cases.description: Use continuous learning to collect useful observations without remembering to run a manual learning command.

prompt_templates.title: Turn Learning On
prompt_templates.prompt: Enable continuous learning mode for this session.
prompt_templates.scenario: Beginner setup before a long session

prompt_templates.title: Start Learning Before Debugging
prompt_templates.prompt: Enable continuous learning mode before we investigate this issue.

prompt_templates.title: Prepare for Design Work
prompt_templates.prompt: Turn on continuous learning so project decisions from this architecture session are captured.

prompt_templates.title: Verify Learning State
prompt_templates.prompt: Enable continuous learning mode, reset the extraction counter, and confirm when automatic extraction will trigger.
prompt_templates.scenario: Advanced workflow with explicit state confirmation

output_examples.output: Continuous learning is enabled. Automatic extraction will run after 10 queries or 30 minutes of activity.

output_examples.input: Turn learning on before we start planning.
output_examples.output: Learning mode is active. Session insights can be saved to the configured knowledge files as activity continues.

output_examples.input: Reset the learning counter and enable learning.
output_examples.output: Learning mode is enabled and the extraction counter is reset for the current session.

best_practices: Enable the skill at the start of long work sessions.
Review saved learnings before relying on them for future work.
Use manual extraction when an important decision should be captured immediately.
anti_patterns: Do not expect this skill to create a knowledge system by itself.
Do not enable it when session information should not be retained.
Do not rely on automatic extraction for urgent or compliance-critical notes.

faq.question: What does this skill change?
faq.answer: It updates the learning state so compatible routers know continuous learning mode is active.

faq.question: Does it send data to a network service?
faq.answer: No evidence of network access was found in the reviewed skill file.

faq.question: Does it run shell commands?
faq.answer: No. The flagged command patterns were markdown formatting, not executable commands.

faq.question: When does extraction happen?
faq.answer: The skill documents extraction after 10 queries or 30 minutes of activity in a compatible router.

faq.question: Can I still extract learnings manually?
faq.answer: Yes. The skill text says manual learning can still be run while continuous mode is active.

faq.question: Who should use this skill?
faq.answer: Use it when long assistant sessions should preserve patterns, decisions, or useful project observations.
